revealed_facts: Rear passenger side quarter panel has been replaced after collision; paint match is slightly off and body lines don't align perfectly with trunk lid
MT-82 manual transmission exhibits grinding when engaging 2nd and 3rd gears; synchros are worn and will require rebuild within 10,000 miles
Odometer rolled back from 127,000 miles; previous owner was a rideshare driver who put on excessive highway miles before selling to auction
